title: Recurrent Models Path
description: Build fluency in Recurrent Models inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs)
steps.summary: Neural networks that use recurrent connections to model sequential data. It sits inside Neural Networks / Recurrent Models. Start after Recurrent Neural Networks and Neural Network. It opens into Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) for Text Generation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Alternating Highway LSTM (AH-LSTM)
steps.summary: ** Alternating Highway LSTM (AH-LSTM) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Recurrent Models. It sits inside Neural Networks / Recurrent Models. Start after Highway Network and Highway Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks
steps.summary: Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Recurrent Models. It sits inside Neural Networks / Recurrent Models. Start after Recurrent Neural Networks and Recurrent Convolutional Networks. It opens into Convolutional Recurrent Neural Networks (CRNN) and Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks (RCNNs).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM)
